BLOODANDHELL:RelicID.NAME: Good Relic
BLOODANDHELL:RelicID.FLAVOR: Flavor text displayed in detailed relic view.
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain [E] at the start of your turn. [E] is an energy icon.

BLOODANDHELL:MyRelic.NAME: My Relic
BLOODANDHELL:MyRelic.FLAVOR: I followed a tutorial and I'm proud of it!
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you play a card, gain #b

BLOODANDHELL:banner.NAME: Bloodstained banner
BLOODANDHELL:banner.FLAVOR: She didn't come here alone.. and this proves it
DESCRIPTIONS: At the end of combat, if your HP digit in the tens place is even, one of your card rewards is upgraded. If it's odd, Gain a potion that raises your max HP by 2 and heals 1 HP when consumed.
